purpose: Records completion claims invalidated by the Phase 14 conformance audit. A claim remains invalidated until its named production evidence is current and passing.

claims.claim: Loader, compiler initialization, and compressor integration are production-complete.

evidence.reason: Baseline captures current artifacts but e2e_execution is not_captured and keyword matrix implementation is incomplete.
REU overlay execution path is absent.

invalidated_checklist_items.task: Implement REU detect / fingerprint skip-reload / dual D64 install path

claims.claim: The release artifacts are current, validated, and within their memory budgets.

evidence.reason: Release packaging and budgets remain under Phase 14 recovery; compressor/high-RAM path is not accepted as complete.
A clean build fingerprint exists, but expansion-native and dual-device release acceptance criteria remain unmet.

invalidated_checklist_items.task: Validate resident byte budget within limit
Move cold helpers to geoRAM (no eligible resident cold helpers; generated report records keep-resident decisions)

claims.claim: The test harness, VICE E2E suite, hardware coverage, and smoke selection prove production behavior.

evidence.reason: No accepted VICE execution capture exists; bounded keyword-matrix execution did not complete.
Only 20 of 81 keyword/mode cells are implemented.

invalidated_checklist_items.task: Validate every callable has unit coverage — `build/phase1_for_benchmark.json`
Validate all BASIC V2 keywords covered with real VICE captures
Verify all E2E tests pass with no placeholder catalog fixtures marked as
Validate all BASIC V3.5 keywords covered with real Plus/4 VICE captures
Verify all E2E tests pass with no placeholder catalog fixtures marked as
Verify all IEEE E2E tests pass with reviewed oracle fixtures, not catalog
Validate smoke selection covers all critical paths
Validate smoke selection runs in < 60 seconds
Verify smoke selection is stable across runs

claims.claim: Compiler/editor code executes via the expansion-native dispatcher on both geoRAM and REU profiles.

evidence.reason: 68 direct jsr/jmp calls target expansion_xip symbols (token/parser/IR/codegen/math/graphics); conforming geoRAM directory coverage is present after hygiene fix.
Many geoasm-classified bodies still execute as low-RAM mirrors; only page-bound pilots use GEORAM_PAGE segments with gate entry.

invalidated_checklist_items.task: Add geoRAM page budget tracking to build
